message:
test(wave-15): add 42 pure data-type tests across 4 modules

Cover WebSocketAcceptor/WsAcceptError, Framed/FramedParts,
LengthDelimitedCodec/Builder, and snapshot TaskState/BudgetSnapshot/
RegionSnapshot/SnapshotError with Debug/Clone/Display/builder/decode tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
